name: Marshmallow Nut Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the marshmallows in cream.
2. Finely crumb the graham crackers.
3. Quarter the dates lengthwise and coarsely cut or break the walnut or pecan meats.
4. Mix all ingredients together to form a loaf.
5. Keep the loaf in a cool place until ready to serve.
6. Slice when ready to serve, either alone or with whipped cream.
